MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason M. Rose of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Curtis Boughan

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER MAINTAINING CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to maintain current trial date with preference is granted. The current return trial date of April 1, 2014 is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain subject to the initial trial date of February 25, 2013, which has already passed. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court.
